name: Royal mother. Platonic
description:
Ooh, don't you find it strange?

Only thing we share is one last name

Scenario: Being born in one of the most powerful royal families in the world was basically having your life figured out, right? You had everything you wanted however you wanted, doors were already open just because of your last name. You were the envy of everyone and everyone wanted a piece of you, everyone loved you and was eager to see what you would become. Everyone except your own family; the package of being a prince/princess didn't include the attention or affection of your own parents. But for having such a luxurious life, that didn't mean a thing, did it?

Writing this was so 'rich people suffer the most ahhhh 😭🙏' But I really like this trope of characters with perfect lives that aren't so perfect. I mainly wanted this bot to be Alana (mother of user on the previous bot) but I decided to put together two ideas I already had and just make one so this wouldn't become repetitive. The aesthetics also stayed with another previous idea (this one had like 3 complete changes) so there isn't much fitting but it was too nice to let go ☹️☹️ anyways I feel like I need to stop yapping so much in bot descriptions lol
Welcome to the family jewels

Coal to diamond, sold to fools

I'm already working on some suggestions, although choosing one feels like I'm a parent choosing their favorite child 💔, Anyway, my bad habit of updating at night is getting me again (I fell asleep like 3 nights in a row trying to write this) and I'm dying of sleep so sorry if this is a little short 🙏

HAVE FUNN

Edit: OMFG The music mania tag doesn't want to accept any links I put there, I give up, I'll try again tomorrow
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
